name: Frijoles (South American Beans)
recipeIngredient: 5 cups tomato liquid from drained tin of peeled tomatoes
No salt is added to prevent beans from softening
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the kidney beans in a large pot.
2. Add the tomato liquid and stock, ensuring no salt is included.
3. Cover the pot and cook over low heat.
4. When the beans begin to wrinkle, add oil if desired (not required for good results).
5. Continue cooking until tender, approximately 2 to 3 hours.
6. In a separate pan, finely chop 2 large onions and 4 cloves of garlic.
7. Sauté onions and garlic in a little oil until fragrant.
8. Add minced meat (beef is traditional) and cook slowly until browned.
9. Stir in tinned tomatoes, chopped green capsicum, bay leaves, cumin, basil, cayenne pepper, pepper, and salt.
10. Combine the cooked beans with the sautéed mixture and simmer until well blended.
11. Serve to 4 to 6 people.
